name: Phishing Triage
description: Trace a suspected phish across its delivery vectors. Pulls Mail.app message metadata, iMessage handle + URL history, Safari history + downloads, and recent quarantined downloads. Encrypted because Mail + iMessage carry personal communications.

plugins.role: Mail.app envelope metadata (sender, subject, received-at) for recent messages
iMessage handles + threads + URL mentions (no message bodies)
Browser history + downloads + installed extensions for clicked-link tracing
Recently quarantined downloads matched against Safari + Mail traffic
